awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: 😎 A curated list of the best resources in the Nix community [maintainer=@houstdav000]
awesomeListMeta.description: 😎 A curated list of the best resources in the Nix community [maintainer=@houstdav000]

nodes.itemHTML: • NixOS Configuration Editorstars98 - Graphical editor for NixOS configuration. Desktop app in Rust and GTK.
• Nix Software Centerstars73 - Install and manage Nix packages. Desktop app in Rust and GTK.

• MyNixOS - Graphical editor for Nix flakes. Create and manage configurations and modules for NixOS and Nix home-manager. Rather a Nix generator than a Nix editor, because it does not allow to import Nix files.
• flake-utils-plusstars281 - A lightweight Nix library flake for painless NixOS flake configuration.
• nvd - Diff package versions between two store paths; it's especially useful for comparing NixOS generations on rebuild.
• manixstars221 - Find configuration options and function documentation for Nixpkgs, NixOS, and Home Manager.
• flake.partsstars96 - Minimal Nix modules framework for Flakes: split your flakes into modules and get things done with community modules.
• haskell-flakestars33 - A flake-parts Nix module for Haskell development.
• nixpkgs-hammeringstars151 - An opinionated linter for Nixpkgs package expressions.
• dream2nixstars287 - A framework for automatically converting packages from other build systems to Nix.
• rnix-lspstars486 - A syntax-checking language server for Nix.
• cranestars243 - A Nix library for building Cargo projects with incremental artifact caching.
• Nix Pills - The best way to learn, with examples.
• Nixerystars1.4k - A Docker-compatible container registry which builds images ad-hoc via Nix.
• commastars524 - Quickly run any binary; wraps together nix run and nix-index.
• nix-diffstars172 - A tool to explain why two Nix derivations differ.
• lorristars414 - A much better nix-shell for development that augments direnv.
• elm2nixstars88 - Convert elm.json into Nix expressions.
• Napalmstars81 - Support for building npm packages in Nix with a lightweight npm registry.
• npmlock2nixstars94 - Generate Nix expressions from a package-lock.json (in-memory), primarily for web projects.
• cargo2nixstars177 - Granular caching, development shell, Nix & Rust integration.
• alejandrastars255 - An opinionated Nix code formatter optimized for speed and consistency.
• Stylixstars59 - System-wide colorscheming and typography for NixOS.
• Makesstars227 - A Nix-based CI/CD pipeline framework for building, testing, and releasing projects in any language, from anywhere.
• NixVimstars83 - A NeoVim distribution built with Nix modules and Nixpkgs.
• Home Managerstars3.3k - Manage your user configuration just like NixOS.
• Nix Review Tools Reports - Reports showing problematic dependencies (dependencies causing the most failed builds) for major Hydra jobsets.
• base16.nixstars69 - Flake way to theme programs in base16stars81 colorschemes, mustache template support included.
• composer-plugin-nixifystars12 - Composer plugin to help with Nix packaging.
• nix-shellstars57 - Nix shells for PHP development.
• robotnixstars352 - A declarative and reproducible build system for Android (AOSP) images.
• nixpkgs-firefox-darwinstars5 - Automatically updated Firefox binary packages for macOS.
• deploy-rsstars575 - A simple multi-profile Nix-flake deploy tool.
• nix-alienstars121 - Run unpatched binaries on Nix/NixOS easily.
• Nix Package Versions - Find all versions of a package that were available in a channel and the revision you can download it from.
• nixpkgs-waylandstars286 - Bleeding-edge Wayland packages.
• How to Learn Nix - It's like a Let's Play, but for obscure software documentation.
• sbt-derivationstars27 - mkDerivation for sbt, similar to buildGoModule.
• #nixos on Libera.Chat
• statixstars286 - A linter/fixer to check for and fix antipatterns in Nix code.
• fenixstars188 - Rust toolchains and Rust analyzer nightly for nix.
• nixpkgs-mozillastars391 - Mozilla's overlay with Rust toolchains and Firefox.
• rust-overlaystars328 - Pure and reproducible nix overlay of binary distributed Rust toolchains.
• Pkgs on Nix - A database with Nix packages at all versions, from all channels.
• nix-cargo-integrationstars97 - A library that allows easy and effortless integration for Cargo projects.
• nixpkgs PR tracker - A tracker for whether a PR has made it into a channel yet.
• devshellstars621 - mkShell with extra bits and a toml config option to be able to onboard non-nix users.
• flake-utilsstars475 - Pure Nix flake utility functions to help with writing flakes.
• node2nixstars388 - Generate Nix expression from a package.json (or package-lock.json) (to be stored as files).
• composer2nixstars72 - Generate Nix expressions to build composer packages.
• composition-c4stars5 - Support for building composer packages from a composer.lock (using IFD).
• nix-phpsstars17 - Flake containing old and unmaintained PHP versions (intended for CI use).
• #nix:nixos.org
• nix-haskell-modestars24 - Automatic Haskell setup in Emacs.
• nixkellstars63 - A Haskell project template using Nix and direnv.
• nixos-upstars163 - Super easy NixOS installer that can be used from the installation ISO.
• nixpkgs-fmtstars346 - Nix code formatter for nixpkgs.
• pushnixstars20 - Simple cli utility that pushes NixOS configuration and triggers a rebuild using ssh.
• nix-treestars239 - Interactively browse the dependency graph of Nix derivations.
• pre-commit-hooks.nixstars225 - Run linters/formatters at commit time and on your CI.
• Colmenastars363 - A simple, stateless NixOS deployment tool modeled after NixOps and morph.
• crystal2nixstars9 - Convert shard.lock into Nix expressions.
• nixduinostars32 - Nix-based tool to help build Arduino sketches.
• rust-nix-templaterstars42 - Generates Nix build and development files for Rust projects.
• NixCon - The annual community conference for contributors and users of Nix and NixOS.
• KubeNixstars286 - A Kubernetes resource builder using Nix.
• NixOpsstars1.2k - The official Nix deployment tool, compatible with AWS, Hetzner, and more.
• Arionstars324 - Run docker-compose with help from Nix/NixOS.
• nixpkgs-reviewstars199 - The best tool to verify that a pull-request in Nixpkgs is building properly.
• Easy PureScript Nixstars169 - A project to easily use PureScript and other tools with Nix.
• Bundixstars118 - Generates a Nix expression for your Bundler-managed application.
• musnixstars258 - Do real-time audio work in NixOS.
• nix.dev - An opinionated guide for developers about getting things done using the Nix ecosystem.
• Tour of Nix - An online interactive tutorial on Nix language constructs.
• Hound - Handily search across all or selected Nix-related repositories.
• NixOS Weekly - The newsletter to stay informed about community updates.
• nixos-generatorsstars705 - Take a NixOS config and build multiple different images types including VirtualBox VMs, Azure images, and installation ISOs.
• Nix Infra Status - Get the age and current git commit of each Nix channel.
• krops - A lightweight toolkit to deploy NixOS systems, remotely or locally.
• terraform-nixosstars218 - A set of Terraform modules designed to deploy NixOS.
• nix-prefetchstars72 - A universal tool for updating source checksums.
• cached-nix-shellstars135 - A nix-shell replacement that uses caching to open subsequent shells quickly.
• Cachix - Hosted binary cache service; free for open-source projects.
• gitignore.nixstars172 - The most feature-complete and easy-to-use .gitignore integration.
• nivstars1.1k - Easy dependency management for Nix projects with package pinning.
• nixcloud-webservicesstars124 - A Nixpkgs extension with a focus on ease of deployment of web-related technologies.
• Simple Nixos Mailserver - A complete mailserver, managed with NixOS modules.
• nix-bitcoinstars266 - Nix packages and NixOS modules for Bitcoin nodes with higher-layer protocols with an emphasis on security.
• NURstars725 - Nix User Repositories. The mother of all overlays, allowing access to user repositories and installing packages via attributes.
• Discourse - The best place to get help and discuss Nix-related topics.
• KuberNixstars655 - Single-dependency Kubernetes clusters via Nix packages.
• poetry2nixstars372 - Build Python packages directly from Poetry's poetry.lock. No conversion step needed.
• naerskstars422 - Build Rust packages directly from Cargo.lock. No conversion step needed.
• nix-indexstars376 - Quickly locate Nix packages with specific files.
• Channel History - Get historical git commits for Nix channels.
• haskell.nixstars438 - Alternative Haskell Infrastructure for Nixpkgs.
• mach-nixstars638 - Tool to create highly reproducible python environments.
• pypi2nixstars190 - Generate Nix expressions for Python packages.
• awesome-nix-hpcstars39 - High Performance Computing package sets.
• nix-direnvstars654 - A fast loader and flake-compliant configuration for the direnv environment auto-loader.
• nixfmtstars305 - A formatter for Nix code, intended to easily apply a uniform style.
• cabal2nixstars302 - Converts a Cabal file into a Nix build expression.
• nixos-shellstars351 - Simple headless VM configuration using Nix (similar to Vagrant).
• Nix Notesstars46 - A collection of short notes about Nix, each contributing to the same virtual machine image.
• Nix Shortsstars330 - A collection of short notes about Nix.
• Wiki (Unofficial)
• terranix - Use Nix and the NixOS module system to write your Terraform code.
• morphstars535 - A tool for managing existing NixOS hosts.
• Discord - Nix/Nixos (Unofficial)
• nix-darwinstars1.2k - Manage macOS configuration just like on NixOS.
